title: tylophora albida
intro: Tylophora albida, also known as the white milkwort or milk vine, is a perennial climber or vine plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antitussive properties, which help in relieving respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Tylophora albida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and provide relief from coughs and colds. Traditional herbal preparations include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat respiratory issues and other ailments.
